sections.description: Auto-generate barcodes, design label templates, manage a print queue, and add products in seconds with the mobile Quick Add workflow.
sections.changelog:
1.1.1

  • Fixed: Label Templates page crashed with wcbpDesigner is not defined JS error.
  • Fixed: Logo image picker on Label Templates page blocked by cross-origin SecurityError (wp_enqueue_media was missing).

1.1.0

  • New: Inventory management module (Barcode Pro → Inventory).
  • New: Barcode scanner — scan or type a SKU to look up any product instantly.
  • New: Adjust stock quantity from the scanner page with an optional reason note.
  • New: Sell One button — scan a product and deduct 1 unit as an in-person sale.
  • New: Low Stock dashboard — see all products below a chosen threshold with quick-adjust.
  • New: Stock History log — every change recorded with before/after quantities, reason, and linked order.
  • New: Orders automatically logged in the stock history when WooCommerce reduces stock.

1.0.1

  • Fixed barcode live preview in product metabox.
  • Added A4 paper size support for label printing.

1.0.0

  • Initial release.
